title: Looking for Category Manager at Swiggy

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Swiggy
jsonLd.description:
Join the Swiggy family as a Category Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Swiggy:
Swiggy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy!
